title: webtrigger detail
text: webtrigger detail Web trigger that responds to an interactive event in a dynamic server page., such as the user clicking on the field. Declaration: — Applies to: Field in dynamic server page Activation: User action Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Description The trigger must be implemented using Javascript and is executed in the client browser. In this case, the trigger is assumed to contain only JavaScript code, except for an optional scope block. For more information, see Client-Side Triggers and Operations . Related Links webtrigger Define a trigger in a DSP that will be executed on the client browser. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
